params_used.custom_text: // This module selects one of the six 4-bit data inputs based on a 3-bit selection input. For selection values 0 to 5, it outputs the corresponding data input. However, when sel is 6 or 7, it performs a bitwise OR operation on the least significant 2 bits of all six data inputs and replicates this 2-bit result to form a 4-bit output.
